item.title: Return of the Meme: 1293 (tortilla chair)
item.description:
Let's get this bread.
This to me is just frigging wild.
The horrors persist, but so do I.
The internet in a nutshell.
I've heard magnolia petals are edible and taste good. I wonder if I could make them into a tea, and therefore into a mead.
But Antarctica is the question.
Yeah, this tracks.
Water again is falling from the sky, thank goodness.
Awebo is a pretty good transcription of the bizzare sounds ptarmigans make. I also feel like this should maybe be Canada's new flag right now?
Corvids are amazing.
Have a good day, the duck offers it.
I mean, I've seen stranger ways to cook tortillas.
The Paleologoi dynasty was a frigging mess.
I love this idea.
This is honestly one of my favorite vintage pieces of Paleoart.
I'm. I'm not sure you could take this critter for a walk. Also, think of this as a preview: Sunday's theme dump is going to be paleo-themed.
Yeah this tracks.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Love you too. Hi Pippin! Peekaboo!" ______ 1) Are you on the run to a safe place and passing through Arizona on your way to safer grounds? My apartment is open to you to crash at, and it is a safe space. Pippin and I will make you a meal and gladly share tea, wine, or mead with you. 2) Hey! If you're a woman or minority in a STEM field in Arizona living north of Phoenix and you need new headshots for this website or another detailing your experiences/research/accomplishment because our monstrous regime has deleted your experience from an official government website, PM me. Pippin and I have a good Nikon DSLR, and we'll do the photos for free, and, uh, you'll get to meet Pippin, I guess? (If you know someone who could use this who's not on Imgur, feel free to PM me to get my email address for them and tell them they're free to message me.) 3) Take your meds with a full glass of water, please. Do it for Pippin, or Space Mom, or better yet, do it for yourself 4) Ĝefeloað wē. We will carry on.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: What Happened Today - #34
item.description: The type IS smaller. And we still had to cut some news. We're at a crossroads on what it means to be America and American. Don't forget today's science rallies in 32 cities. Spread the word. #resist #GovBriefToday Your links: 1 - https://www.nbcnews.com/politics/trump-administration/trump-administration-must-pay-debts-usaid-partners-monday-judge-rules-rcna195248 2 - https://www.reuters.com/business/tariff-reprieve-likely-be-extended-all-usmca-compliant-goods-lutnick-says-2025-03-06/ 3 - https://thehill.com/regulation/court-battles/5179829-judge-blocks-trump-omb-freeze/ 4 - https://www.frommers.com/trip-ideas/national-park/full-list-of-34-national-park-leases-cancelled-parks-being-dismantled-before-our-eyes/ 5 - https://thehill.com/policy/technology/5180939-trump-considers-extending-tiktok-ban/ 6 - https://www.hrdive.com/news/federal-judge-reinstates-fired-nlrb-member-gwynne-wilcox/741848/ 7 - https://apnews.com/article/house-censure-green-trump-joint-address-61d82026983c99a269209bbeb32b45a5 8 - https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/politics/doge-targets-child-support-database-full-of-income-data/ar-AA1AotGu 9 - https://www.cbc.ca/news/canada/toronto/ontario-electricity-surcharge-us-tariffs-ford-1.7476515 10 - https://www.usatoday.com/story/news/politics/2025/03/06/trump-republicans-amy-coney-barrett-dei-supreme-court/81843688007/ 11 - https://www.axios.com/2025/03/06/trump-perkins-coie-security-clearances 12 - https://www.theguardian.com/us-news/2025/mar/06/gavin-newsom-trans-people-sports 13 - https://newrepublic.com/post/192442/doge-marocco-sued-us-marshals-takeover-usadf-agency 14 - https://edition.cnn.com/2025/03/05/business/musk-usps-amtrak-privatization/index.html 15 - https://www.nbcwashington.com/news/local/trump-says-dc-must-clear-unsightly-homeless-encampments/3860501/ 16 - https://www.cnbc.com/2025/03/06/treasury-secretary-bessent-says-the-american-dream-is-not-about-access-to-cheap-goods.html 15 - https://thehill.com/homenews/administration/5181461-trump-msnbc-nicolle-wallace-rachel-maddow/ FIGHTING BACK - https://standupforscience2025.org/ Archive - https://govbrief.today

item.dc:creator: TheReturnOfMadJuan

item.title: Physically I’m fine. My mental state is in a tailspin.
item.description: I feel like the world is crashing in around me and I wake up every morning with panic attacks. I was in the ER this past Sunday for it. I wanna get better. I’ve been sober from alcohol for 15 years now, and I wanna drink, but I can’t ruin this run I’ve been on with it. What meds can you suggest I talk to my dr about? I don’t wanna get high I just wanna feel good about myself again. Thanks for being there:) Update 1: I’m in the waiting room now:) New update: It’s been several hours, and the Dr I saw prescribed sertraline(sp) and clonazipam(sp), as well as therapy sessions for my adhd, but I can’t get any meds for for several days bc of health insurance bs. I was on the phone for over an hour and getting transferred left and right and am currently sitting in my car in front of a CVS crying into my phone bc I want help and can’t get it. And on top of this, one of our clients bought us pizza today at work that I missed out on:( It was Mountain Mike’s too. I love their stuff. Thanks for the support I really need it rn
item.dc:creator: FutonTorpedo

item.title: Imgur Made Me a Custom Avatar! I AM SO HAPPY
item.description: Video itself pretty much sums up my feelings, but I cannot tell you how excited this all makes me ? Love ya @Imgur! https://imgur.com/gallery/kF8g6HM/comment/2447626867 Check out the interview here alongside the amazing and incredible @makeupbillyfx and @pikajane - who are Imgurians you need to follow right now!!

item.title: Deviousness Day 149
item.description:
with my spree posting my deviousness folder is now replenished. so will be doing some deviousness week and/or weeks soon. and also for my borthday week the first week of april. yay. also It is friday yay! I do plan on doing more co-op chaos gaming fun tonight and through the weekend. might post some more memes. idk. my week is off cause of only getting home tuesday. anyway. memes. enjoy!
The above image was made by the wonderful CammyJay! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share artwork! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe I am changing how I add people to my ping list so please see here to get added or removed: https://imgur.com/a/fFYOR2B there is now the option on desktop to follow when someone posts so feel free to do that and lemme know and I can remove you from the ping list. I dont think I will get rid of it entirely so if you prefer the special feeling of getting a ping it will also continue to be an option.

item.title: Potato's Daily Dirties
item.description:
It is friday yay! I do plan on doing more co-op chaos gaming fun tonight and through the weekend. might post some more memes. idk. my week is off cause of only getting home tuesday. anyway. memes. enjoy!
night stand. glove compartment. pocket.
om. good girl o.o
not anymore.
I do cause dis.
planning on it.
please?
I om. am getting better at not staying in bed when I wake up. Lucifer helps. my cat.
I am very touch based cuddly.
me pouting even tho I know its not me and also I like attention and always want more.
I do like doing the craft things now. and puzzles. and little things.
I feel like I just posted dis.
need more forehead kisses.
itll go in my brain queue and at some point I will get around to it. I dont commit to time frames tho.
The above image was made by the wonderful @PyroDragon! They have their own channel in the Deviousness discord where they share links to their dumps and be an all around dragony dragon! I has a Deviousness discord server! We do have a hard rule of no politics and/or religion. The discord is a safe space to get away from the bullshit going on. We have a bunch of areas including a SFW area, content creator area, a NSFW area and more! We have gaming fun! We have spontaneous gaming and some ping roles for people to use to get groups together based on US and EU time zones! We have scheduled gaming that the wonderful @PyroDragon (who is a Silly Dragony Dragon) is running on Saturdays! *It'll be the Jackbox or Jackbox-type games that downloading them isn't necessary. All that is needed to participate is Discord, access to a web browser and semi-reliable Internet connection!* So feel free to wander in and say haii! Thank you to everyone who has joined and made it such a unique and special place! Deviousness discord that is 18+: https://discord.gg/deviousness Deviousness steam group: https://steamcommunity.com/groups/DeviousnessDiscord
artist of work above (aside from my signing potato on it): https://florahv.artstation.com/projects/XnL8P3 "Life is made up of desires that seem big and vital one minute, and little and absurd the next. I guess we get what's best for us in the end." - Alice Caldwell Rice I am on dis now and trying to remember to linky over there too for when I post: https://bsky.app/profile/potatocheesmonk.bsky.social I has a post with links to all my past posts. enjoy: https://imgur.com/a/ZDA2CBe

item.title: Meet kitty!
item.description:
Kitty is one of Sophie's babies. She was the runt of the litter and she was living outside until she came back one day with a severe head tilt. Brought her to the vet, got her on meds for her ears but the tilt still persist so she's been living inside with me
I don't really think she minds staying in
She's obviously made herself at home haha

[Calling Moses] Hey Moses? Yeah I know I'm not Jewish or Christian or Muslim or anything but you should come down to Mar-a-Lago. Yeah bring the furnace.
hell yeah
Bucees owo
Wasn't even a trailer, it was a Teaser. Also they're Ogres. They're not meant to be attractive!

item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: America moment
item.description: Until now, I always thought “I’m fine with driving a bit if I can get a cheaper place further out.” What a fool I was. That travel time added to every outing meant that I put them off as long as I could, and suffered in the meantime. Being able to walk to get food is the biggest quality of life improvement I’ve had in some time. Grocery store is like a 4 minute walk away instead of a 20 minute drive. I no longer have to do “the big shop” which I dreaded. I can simply grab a few things every couple days. I get more fresh air. I get more steps in. Saving on gas. Don’t have to sit in traffic. I’m home in like 12 minutes round trip. I still have to drive for almost anything beyond groceries and fast food, but those alone have been huge. Even when I do have to drive, it’s less time on the road since I’m closer. I don’t think I’ll be able to give that up when it’s time to find a new place. Highly recommend.
item.dc:creator: CamelEnamel

item.title: A large gathering of rays and manatees in Tampa Bay
item.description: The Cownose Rays in the video are migrating. The manatees were just passing through the migrating fever (group of rays). The sand on this shallow sand flat is greenish yellow like most of the sand in the bays and bayous of Florida. There's nothing wrong with it, it's natural. The water also has a greenish tint to it because of algae, that's also natural. The water in the Gulf usually has a greenish tint to it and how clear it is usually depends on the wind rain and tides. It fluctuates from day to day, week to week and month to month. Large groups of marine animals like rays or manatees can often stir up a bunch of sediment from the bottom as they move around in shallow areas, also making the water murky. Real point being that just because water has a greenish tint to it, doesn't mean there is something wrong with it. The Gulf has been that way for much longer than any of us have been around. For anyone that want's to educate themselves further, here's a link to a great BBC documentary about "green seas" and how they support a massive amount of marine life compared to other oceans or seas. https://www.imdb.com/title/tt7579758/
item.dc:creator: SeeThroughCanoe

item.title: Just keep swimming...
item.description: Sorry for the sad post, I try to be an upbeat SoB. Tomorrow is the 3rd year anniversary of my wifes passing. We started dating just before we turned 21, and we never left each other's side till she died in my arms 2 months before her 43rd bday. I plan on turning off my phone, getting really stoned, and driving the Texas Hill Country. I'm at the point of just wanting someone to hold, but im too much of a coward to do anything about it. Anywho, sorry for the blah blah blah. To all my fellow Imgurians, I love you all. Thank you for the support and kindness.
item.dc:creator: EdwinEastwood

item.title: Outfit poll winner!
item.description: I did an outfit poll on my patreon and discord. Basically I had everyone vote for which outfit I’d draw!! Was very fun! What’s your fave? Extra content: www.patreon.com/miaormoa
item.dc:creator: miaormoa
